Uses of Package
com.enovka.gemini4j.domain.type

  • Packages that use com.enovka.gemini4j.domain.type 
    Package Description
    com.enovka.gemini4j.domain  
    com.enovka.gemini4j.domain.type  
  • Classes in com.enovka.gemini4j.domain.type used by com.enovka.gemini4j.domain 
    Class Description
    AnswerStyleEnum
    Specifies the desired style for generating grounded answers.
    BlockedReasonEnum
    Lists the reasons why content may have been blocked during processing.
    BlockReasonEnum
    Specifies the reason why the prompt was blocked.
    FinishReasonEnum
    Defines the possible reasons why the model stopped generating tokens.
    HarmBlockThresholdEnum
    Defines the harm probability thresholds for content blocking.
    HarmCategoryEnum
    Represents the categories of potential harm that content can be classified into.
    HarmProbabilityEnum
    Represents the probability levels that content is classified with for each harm category.
    ModeEnum
    Defines the execution modes for function calling, dictating how the model handles function predictions.
    OperatorEnum
    Defines the operators that can be applied to key-value pairs when filtering content based on metadata.
    PermissionStateEnum
    Represents the possible states of a permission.
    StateEnum
    Defines the states for the lifecycle of a Chunk.
    TaskTypeEnum
    Defines the type of task for which an embedding will be used.
    TypeEnum
    Enumerates the supported OpenAPI data types, as defined by OpenAPI Specification v3.0.3.
  • Classes in com.enovka.gemini4j.domain.type used by com.enovka.gemini4j.domain.type 
    Class Description
    AnswerStyleEnum
    Specifies the desired style for generating grounded answers.
    BlockedReasonEnum
    Lists the reasons why content may have been blocked during processing.
    BlockReasonEnum
    Specifies the reason why the prompt was blocked.
    FinishReasonEnum
    Defines the possible reasons why the model stopped generating tokens.
    HarmBlockThresholdEnum
    Defines the harm probability thresholds for content blocking.
    HarmCategoryEnum
    Represents the categories of potential harm that content can be classified into.
    HarmProbabilityEnum
    Represents the probability levels that content is classified with for each harm category.
    ModeEnum
    Defines the execution modes for function calling, dictating how the model handles function predictions.
    OperatorEnum
    Defines the operators that can be applied to key-value pairs when filtering content based on metadata.
    PermissionStateEnum
    Represents the possible states of a permission.
    StateEnum
    Defines the states for the lifecycle of a Chunk.
    TaskTypeEnum
    Defines the type of task for which an embedding will be used.
    TypeEnum
    Enumerates the supported OpenAPI data types, as defined by OpenAPI Specification v3.0.3.
